title: Returns & Exchanges
body: We want you to be satisfied with your purchase. If you need to exchange an item, you have 14 days from the delivery date to request an exchange for a different size. We do not offer refunds; store credit or exchanges only. To initiate an exchange or report a damaged item, contact us at booking@gmfproductions.com with your order number and photos of the issue. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in their original condition. This policy is presented for preview purposes. Final terms will be confirmed upon live launch.
